rationale: Section 26.1127 governs tax calculation for donated homestead exemptions under Section 11.132 (disabled veterans), which is a distinct exemption from the general residence homestead exemption in Section 11.13(b). No overlap or interaction.
quote: if at any time during a tax year property is owned by an individual who qualifies for an exemption under Section 11.132
_note: Rule addresses Section 11.132 (disabled veteran donated homestead), not Section 11.13(b) general residence homestead; no conflict identified.
